name: Fairway's at Brooks Place Tavern
about: The Fairways at Brooks Place Tavern is an indoor golf simulator venue operating within a tavern setting. It offers a unique combination of virtual golf play and full food and beverage service. The venue provides hourly bay rentals, with rates charged per bay rather than per person, making it suitable for groups of varying sizes. This setup allows for a casual social atmosphere where patrons can golf and dine simultaneously.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient hourly bay rentals with pricing the same regardless of number of golfers
Full food and beverage service available directly while playing
Located within a tavern, creating a relaxed atmosphere for both golf and socializing

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available while playing, featuring all food options from Brooks Place Tavern
Full bar available while playing, offering beer, wine, and cocktail options

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs to play?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether rental clubs are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not mentioned. The venue provides full service for food and drinks from Brooks Place Tavern while you are playing.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as kid-friendly and offers a full menu suitable for families.
